arts.ttl: “No doubt” – Report gives Arsenal hope of signing £62.5m forward in the summer
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly look to have been given major hope over a potential summer transfer window move for Wolves forward Matheus Cunha. The talented Brazilian has been in fine form in the Premier League this season, and it’s not too surprising to see that there have been plenty of rumours linking him with bigger clubs. arts.ttl: How to watch Newcastle vs Arsenal: TV channel and live stream for Carabao Cup today
arts.sum: The Gunners must overturn two-goal deficit in semi-final second leg

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's £1.2bn stadium decision as St James' Park timeline remains
arts.sum: The cost of both potential projects will undoubtedly have a big impact on the final plans, with reports suggesting a new 70,000-capacity stadium could cost around £1.2billion to build. The Telegraph reported on Monday that Newcastle are leaning towards building a brand new stadium next to their current location, with the designs showing some of the new ground overlapping with the land St James' Park currently sits on.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe wants to do 'something special' at Newcastle United as Arsenal plan revealed
arts.sum: Cup fever has struck Tyneside in recent days and even though Saturday's defeat to Fulham has added a dash of extra nerves to Wednesday's night St James' Park showdown, there is optimism in the air that Newcastle can again reach Wembley as they bid to end their lengthy cup hoodoo. Despite relegation fights and tense top four chases, Howe has never sought to field a weaken team or disregard the domestic cups as a waste of time, energy and resources - as other managers often have.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals why Arsenal wonderkid Ethan Nwaneri is not allowed in the Gunners dressing room
arts.sum: Nwaneri is in the midst of a stunning breakthrough campaign, slotting into the Gunners starting XI with ease and providing a viable solution to their issues on the right flank.

arts.ttl: Premier League title race favourites: Why Liverpool's win against Bournemouth means more than Arsenal's Manchester City victory
arts.sum: Liverpool's win against Bournemouth is more impressive than Arsenal's victory against Manchester City, and the Reds should be confident of winning the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arsenal guaranteed to be without five players for Newcastle Carabao Cup clash
arts.sum: That means, when looking at the official Arsenal website, the Gunners have 17 senior players available for selection for the game vs Newcastle. Alexander Isak and Anthony Gordon both scored in the first leg at Emirates Stadium at the start of January and Arteta knows the threat the home side will pose his team.

arts.ttl: I was in Arsenal dressing room when air turned blue after Newcastle 'embarrassment'
arts.sum: Newcastle, in contrast, have tasted defeat in each of their last two games at St James', but the visit of Arsenal tends to bring out the best in this side and this stadium. "Us and the crowd have become a really potent team together and that's what we're going to need in this game," he said ahead of the Magpies' Carabao Cup semi-final second-leg against Arsenal .

arts.ttl: Arsenal ‘approach’ hints at summer transfer as clear January stance emerges
arts.sum: Speaking in his pre-match press conference ahead of the Carabao Cup clash against Newcastle, he said: “We had a clear intention which is always there is a window open to explore the opportunities to improve our squad with players that can impact it. The Gunners didn’t add any new signings to their squad, despite their need for attacking reinforcements.

arts.ttl: 'That's what we're going to need': Eddie Howe shares the 'really potent' weapon he plans to use v Arsenal tonight
arts.sum: Newcastle United will hope to reach a second League Cup final in three seasons when they take on Arsenal in Wednesday night’s semi-final second leg...
